title: TFMG - Cast to Industrial
description: Changing the hue values of TFMG's Cast Iron blocks to match the Industrial Iron color palette
body:
Did you ever think that TFMG's Cast Iron could just be Industrial Iron like everyone else?

Look no further: This pack shifts Cast Iron's colors **and** names! ( en_us only )

This pack was made by shifting the original textures' hue ands lightness values. Original assets belong to Pepa and DrMangoTea, all rights reserved to them
